name: Island Park
description: Come play pickleball at Island Park in Mount Pleasant, MI! There are 6 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Morey Courts Recreation Center
description: Morey Courts Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Mount Pleasant, MI. There are 4 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.
